question: Who has sanctions or watchlist hits?
Which customers have the highest perpetual-KYC risk?
How many customers require EDD review by risk band?
Show the strongest behavioural peer-group anomalies
How many fraud alerts by type and severity?
How many cases by scenario and team?

instructions.title: note_1
instructions.instruction: Investec Sentinel is an AML/financial-crime platform. Answer over the gold marts. Glossary: SAR = Suspicious Activity Report; EDD = Enhanced Due Diligence; pKYC = perpetual KYC (continuously recomputed customer risk); PEP = politically exposed person; UBO = ultimate beneficial owner; typology = a money-laundering pattern (e.g. structuring, layering, smurfing).

instructions.title: note_2
instructions.instruction: Grain & joins: fraud_alerts is one row per alert (alert_type, severity, score 0-1, status). sherlock_cases is one row per investigation case (scenario, priority, status, team_name, analyst_name, risk_score, amount, days_open). Join alerts/cases to customers via entity: fraud_alerts.primary_entity_id -> entities.entity_id; customer_360.customer_id is the customer grain. sanctions_screening_hits and pkyc_customer_risk key on entity_id/customer_id.

instructions.title: note_3
instructions.instruction: Severity values are 'critical','high','medium','low'. When asked for 'high risk', prefer severity in ('critical','high') or pkyc_customer_risk.risk_band='critical'. 'Fewer false positives' relates to the ml model, not these marts. Sanctions/watchlist hits: confidence in ('confirmed','probable','possible'); list_type e.g. 'sanctions','pep','adverse_media'.

curated_questions.question: Who has sanctions or watchlist hits?

answer.sql: SELECT entity_name, list_type, list_source, watch_name, confidence, match_score FROM elexon_app_for_settlement_acc_catalog.investec_fraud_aml_gold.sanctions_screening_hits ORDER BY CASE confidence WHEN 'confirmed' THEN 0 WHEN 'probable' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, match_score DESC

curated_questions.question: Which customers have the highest perpetual-KYC risk?

answer.sql: SELECT full_name, segment, country, dynamic_risk, risk_band, edd_review_required, sanction_hits, media_hits FROM elexon_app_for_settlement_acc_catalog.investec_fraud_aml_gold.pkyc_customer_risk ORDER BY dynamic_risk DESC LIMIT 25

curated_questions.question: How many customers require EDD review by risk band?

answer.sql: SELECT risk_band, count(*) AS customers, sum(CASE WHEN edd_review_required THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS edd_required FROM elexon_app_for_settlement_acc_catalog.investec_fraud_aml_gold.pkyc_customer_risk GROUP BY risk_band ORDER BY customers DESC

curated_questions.question: Show the strongest behavioural peer-group anomalies

answer.sql: SELECT full_name, segment, anomaly_score, z_txn_count, z_total_value, z_distinct_cps, explanation FROM elexon_app_for_settlement_acc_catalog.investec_fraud_aml_gold.peer_anomaly WHERE anomaly_score >= 2 ORDER BY anomaly_score DESC

curated_questions.question: How many fraud alerts by type and severity?

answer.sql: SELECT alert_type, severity, count(*) AS alerts FROM elexon_app_for_settlement_acc_catalog.investec_fraud_aml_gold.fraud_alerts GROUP BY alert_type, severity ORDER BY alerts DESC

curated_questions.question: How many cases by scenario and team?

answer.sql: SELECT scenario, team_name, count(*) AS cases FROM elexon_app_for_settlement_acc_catalog.investec_fraud_aml_gold.sherlock_cases GROUP BY scenario, team_name ORDER BY cases DESC
